lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'mature', 'notes': 'DSL broadband is mature. Known answer applied.', 'source': 'known'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Cable broadband is active. Known answer applied.', 'source': 'known'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'discontinued', 'notes': 'Frame Relay is discontinued. Known answer applied.', 'source': 'known'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'end-of-life', 'notes': 'ISDN is end-of-life in most countries. Known answer applied.', 'source': 'known'}
notes: Regulated telecom service used historically at small remote offices; being displaced by broadband.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'legacy-unsupported', 'notes': 'Dial-up ISP is legacy-unsupported. Known answer applied.', 'source': 'known'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': '802.11 WiFi is active. Known answer applied.', 'source': 'known'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Personal firewall software remains active and standard security practice. lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'discontinued', 'notes': 'GoRemote Internet Communications (formerly GRIC) was acquired by iPass Inc. for $76.5M in late 2005/early 2006. lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'discontinued', 'notes': 'GoRemote Total Security Protection (TSP) was a GoRemote Communications product, discontinued following the iPass acquisition of GoRemote in early 2006. lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'discontinued', 'notes': 'GoRemote Universal Remote Control (Dashboard) was a GoRemote Communications product, discontinued following the iPass acquisition of GoRemote in early 2006.', 'source': 'https://www.rcrwireless.com/20051212/archived-articles/ipass-to-purchase-rival-goremote-for-76-5m'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'discontinued', 'notes': 'GoRemote TierOne Global Network was the managed global connectivity network operated by GoRemote Communications.
